chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-1540 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 10.09.2025. Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for KMC. Mr. Mehran Khan, A.A.G. --------------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner states on instructions that he is satisfied with the undertaking made by counsel appearing on behalf of the KMC on 01.09.2025 and seeks that the Petition may be disposed of in light thereof. Ordered accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of in terms of the aforementioned Order. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
